Agent: 'Bacca wants Sevilla return'
By Football Italia staff

Carlos Bacca’s agent reiterates the Milan striker “wants to return to Sevilla. Unfortunately, the Rossoneri have other ideas.”

The Colombia international is frozen out and wasn’t even in training ahead of the Europa League preliminary round ties with Craiova.

“It is now well known that Carlos wants to return to Sevilla,” Sergio Barila told Spanish newspaper AS.

“He had a splendid personal and sporting experience in that city, which is why he wants to return. This is an important year for players, that of the World Cup, so he needs to play in order to take part.

“He is in good shape physically and ready for a great season.”

Sevilla sold Bacca to Milan for €30m in the summer of 2015, but he has fallen out of favour with Coach Vincenzo Montella.

“When Bacca arrived at Milan, he signed a five-year contract and had every intention of seeing it through to the last day of that agreement,” continued the representative.

“Unfortunately, there was a change at the helm and now the Rossoneri have other ideas. The best thing to do would be to find a solution that makes everyone happy.”

ADRIAN LATEST

Newcastle are targeting a deal to sign goalkeeper Adrian from West Ham, according to Sky sources.

The Magpies are keen to bolster their goalkeeping options ahead of the new Premier League season and have identified the 30-year-old as a key target.

West Ham exercised an option to extend Adrian’s contract at the club by a further two years earlier in the summer, but have since signed Joe Hart on a season-long loan from Manchester City.

Manager Slaven Bilic expressed his desire to keep Adrian, despite the arrival of Hart at the London Stadium, and even suggested that he would be willing to hand him another new contract in a bid to convince him to stay.

West Ham sold goalkeeper Darren Randolph to Middlesbrough for £5m in July and would only consider sanctioning a sale of Adrian if they can secure a replacement.

VARELA SET TO LEAVE?

Guillermo Varela is set to leave Manchester United and re-join Penarol, according to the Manchester Evening News.

The 24-year-old spent last season on loan at Eintracht Frankfurt and did not report back for United first-team training in July.

Apparently Penarol have reached an agreement over a transfer fee which includes a sell-on clause and Varela will sign a three-year deal.

DJOUROU 'JOINS OWLS'

Former Arsenal defender Johan Djourou has reportedly agreed a deal to sign for Sheffield Wednesday.

The Sheffield Star say Djourou, who was a free agent, will be unveiled today after completing a medical on Friday.

Verratti confirms PSG stay
By Football Italia staff
[img]http://www.football-italia.net/sites/default/files/imagecache/main_photo/[type]/[nid]/verratti-epa050817_0.jpg[/img]
Marco Verratti reveals “there was something” with Barcelona but insists “I decided to stay” at Paris Saint-German, even before Neymar.

Verratti was heavily linked with Barca during the first part of the summer, but the Catalans failed to agree a fee with PSG, who later signed Neymar for a world-record, €222m.

“Barcelona? There was something, but that was as far as it went. We didn’t have any other negotiations,” the midfielder told Sky Sport Italia.

“I decided to stay on this path and I’m happy for it. Did Neymar change my mind? I did way before. I never knew that Neymar would come here.”

施蒙尼：我對哥斯達興趣不大

外傳迪亞高哥斯達將返回馬德里體育會，不過馬體會教頭施蒙尼指出他對哥斯達沒有太大興趣。

哥斯達去季是車路士神射手，但新季他勢被干地放棄，有指中超球隊天津權健想簽入他。

干地已經講過不再需要哥斯達效力，今場社區盾哥斯達也不是後備名單之列。

28歲的哥斯達想返回馬體會，不過馬體會因為被國際足協懲罰，要在下年1月才可簽人加盟。

與此同時，施蒙尼說沒有興趣評論哥斯達轉會問題：「我不想講這件事情太多，現在他仍在車路士。最重要是我提升球隊的訓練質素，現在這支球隊的人手已經令我很滿意。」

哥斯達有意正式提交轉會申請，有傳AC米蘭正在留意這位球星動向。(Goal.com)

個個講轉會都係睇英國BBC、Sky、法國隊報、德國Kicker、意大利DiMarzio既消息多，普遍都覺得呢幾個最權威

但以我近半年觀察，我覺得法國RMC啲料都好準，應該僅次BBC，就算冇頭二，都肯定比Sky同DM信得過

有冇巴打有同感 或者都有跟開RMC

同埋如果跟開轉會費，小弟強烈不建議大家睇BBC

好多時未落實個陣，佢地個估價同後尾球會官宣都好有分別

重點係，就算球會公佈左價錢，佢地都唔會改返，仲係跟自己個套，甚至一個月後話「xxx上月以x萬加盟」都仲錯緊

Sky通常比較好，但都間唔中有甩漏。

如果要知英格蘭球隊之間交易的轉會費，根據我少少經驗，衛報係最信得過

補充多一段，我知好多巴打都會好信Transfermarkt既數字。

佢地係德國媒體，德國球會轉會的所有數字，基本上都係抄返踢球者或者圖片報。德國最可靠都係呢兩間咁我地都唯有信。

但如果係英國方面，佢地係會跟BBC同Sky，尤其係BBC，所以真係唔好信咁足。Sky有個轉會中心，數字都係有參考價值，但BBC就真係勸大家唔好信，所以我都唔會睇Transfermarkt的英國轉會費。

都係個句，英國球會的話，睇衛報啦。

西班牙比較少留意，但印象中係跟As，唔係跟Marca (有錯請指正)。意大利更加少留意。

法國，佢地係跟隊報多，我上面推介的RMC好似不受重視。雖然我覺得RMC爆料準過隊報，但轉會費方面，隊報係唯一一間爆出文加拉去曼城唔係40m歐，而係53.8m的媒體，雖然係事後一段時間先爆，但都算值得信賴。

RMC我都係睇傳聞多過轉會費，但佢地係極少數，甚至好似係唯一一家話貝拿度施華去mc係70m的媒體。我覺得佢地有少少似Guardian，都可以信賴。

其他國家真係冇留意。

最後最後最後，Transfermarkt英國版網站 (.en)，轉會費係用英鎊，

參考價值係零，完全係零，千祈唔好睇英國版。

因為歐元先係佢地個database的數字，英鎊個數會隨著當時兌歐元個匯率，係計返個一刻英鎊值幾錢。

即係話，英鎊會隨住匯率跳，完全唔係交易落實時個數。

舉個例，托利斯六年前50m鎊去車，而家睇可能跳到去45m鎊。反而係六年前轉會個日兌歐計左係58.5m歐元，呢個數先準，同埋唔會跳。

所以就算係英國球會轉英國球會都好，都要睇歐元，想知英鎊幾錢，唯有自己上網搵返當日匯率去計返。

不過最好都係自己搵返轉會當日，天空或者衛報的報導。
